books.title: God's Bible Timeline: The Big Book of Biblical History
books.author: Linda Finlayson
books.rationale: Contains age-appropriate commentary on the eras of the Bible, along with detailed timelines, known dates, and a timeline poster. Lessons will refer to the timeline when reviewing stories and events.
books.sharedText:
Old Testament: Grade 2
New Testament: Grade 2

books.title: The Bible Story Handbook
books.author: John and Kim Walton
books.rationale: This teacher resource from Bible scholar John Walton and his wife, Kim, provides helpful background information for teaching the Bible. In a succinct manner, they offer the biblical context, interpretational issues, and mistakes to avoid for numerous Biblical passages.
books.sharedText:
Old Testament: Grade 2
New Testament: Grade 2

books.title: ESV Large Print Bible
books.rationale: This large-print ESV Bible uses 12-point type for ease of reading
